game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **버거체인 스토리 (Burger Chain Story):** 버거체인 스토리 is a burger restaurant management simulation where players operate a burger shop, using tap controls to develop and serve a diverse menu. The core mechanic involves combining various ingredients, suchs as 'fish fry' with 'tartar sauce' or 'bacon' with 'lettuce' and 'fried egg', to create unique signature burgers, side dishes, and desserts, with ingredients acquired from different suppliers. Players manage staff with distinct personalities to efficiently serve customers, whose satisfaction and the shop's popularity are directly influenced by the quality and variety of the menu. Progression is achieved by earning revenue to open additional branches (e.g., 2nd, 3rd) and expand the burger chain, while competing against rival shops to become the top-rated establishment in each area. The ultimate objective is to maximize profits, customer happiness, and overall brand reputation through continuous menu innovation and strategic expansion.
game_info.description: Run a burger restaurant empire! Combine ingredients to create signature burgers, serve customers to earn money, and expand your chain. Unlock new ingredients from suppliers, hire staff to boost efficiency, and compete against rival shops. Your goal is to maximize profits, customer satisfaction, and reputation while opening multiple branches to dominate the burger market.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and select options
Space: Confirm selection, serve customers, create burgers
Z: Quick action (skip/speed up animations)
Shift: View detailed info/switch views
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart game

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics including ingredient selection, burger creation, and customer service. Validates that the player can interact with the game systems and complete basic actions without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Randomly selects ingredients and creates burgers, serves customers when available, and periodically purchases new ingredients. Tests movement through menus and basic interactions.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game runs without errors, customers are served, money is earned, and the game state updates correctly. No crashes or frozen states occur during random gameplay.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal win strategy by efficiently managing resources, creating high-quality burgers, and expanding the business. Validates that the win condition (opening 3 branches with high reputation) is achievable.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Focuses on creating optimal burger combinations for maximum customer satisfaction, efficiently serving customers to maximize revenue, purchasing strategic ingredients, and expanding branches as soon as funds allow. Prioritizes speed and quality.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully opens 3 branches, maintains high customer satisfaction and reputation scores, and triggers the GAME_OVER_WIN condition within a reasonable timeframe.
